text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, at Tamamo Cross's family residence...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Tama, didja finally settle the score from last
summer?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Huh? ...What're you talkin' about?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text:
You know, the whole thing 'bout who's faster, you
or Oguri. I know you won in the end, but...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that. You bet I won. And not just against
Oguri either. C'mere, lemme tell ya aaall about it.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Gather 'round and hear the tale of "Tamamo
Cross 'n the Three Beasts"!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Yay! Tell us, Tama! Tell us!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
There I was, sailin' smoothly along on my way to
Takarazuka Island... when all of a sudden, this
great big hungry monster called Inari One came
at me!

text_block_list.name: Monstrous Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Grrr! Gimme some inari sushi on za double! Cough
up za sushi or you're gonna get it!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But little did she know, I had a counterattack
waitin'! Yep, I fed her a whole mountain of
takoyaki, so she lost her bite real fast.

text_block_list.name: Monstrous Inari One
text_block_list.text: Guh, I guess takayaki's fine too. Whatever...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So I set off travelin' again, only for this other beast called Oguri Cap to show up. Now, this wasn't the first time she chased after me—I'd already met her on the Tenno Isles, JC Island and Arima Bay!

text_block_list.name: Monstrous Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama... I want to eat you. Please, I'm so hungry!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
I was like "You gotta be kiddin' me! If ya think I'm
just gonna hop on a platter for ya, dream on!" So
then we got into a major tussle, 'n by the time it
was over...

text_block_list.name: Monstrous Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What?! Am I inside Tama's stomach? Hm. I guess she ended up eating me...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
But Oguri wasn't the only one that attacked me at
the Arima Bay. The cuddle monster herself, Super
Creek, came at me too!

text_block_list.name: Giant Mommy Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Ready, Tamtam? ♪ I'm going to tear you to itty
bitty bits!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
No way was I lettin' that happen. So I got her to
chase me 'round the bay in circles till she was
about as wobbly as soggy spaghetti.

text_block_list.name: Giant Mommy Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh dear, Tamtam's in her rebellious phase. I miss my widdle cuddle buddy...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: And that's how I came out on top this year! And I lived happily ever after!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
So go ahead, tell all your friends. You tell 'em
your big sis's stronger than Oguri, Inari, and
Creek!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Wow, Tama! You're amazin'!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text:
But what happened to the three beasts after ya
beat 'em?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, those losers? They became my servants.
Now they do whatever I tell 'em.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, they're like a buncha baby ducks. It's
cute seein' 'em waddle after me everywhere I go.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hey! We went to the trouble of comin' to your
hometown to see ya! Can't ya paint us in a better
light than that?!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Well, it is true that we couldn't beat Tama...
Oh, right. Hi there, I'm... Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, you two are just so adorable! I want to squeeze you both tight! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap?! Inari One?! Super Creek?!
Tama, what's going on?

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Well, ya see, these three really wanted to meet
you squirts, so I brought 'em along.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: So now... Let 'em have it! Show 'em what it means to play with my siblings!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Brother
text_block_list.text:
Um, Oguri Cap! Truth is... I, uh, think you're kinda
awesome too.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Really? Thank you... but it's thanks to Tama that
I've gotten this strong.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross's Little Sister
text_block_list.text: Um, Creek... I...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I bet you want uppies, don't you? Well,
you've come to the right person! Up, up and
away!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hm, so this is the favor ya asked us for? Can't say
I was expectin' something so... domestic. There's
more to you than I thought, Tama.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, I owe you three big time! Look how
happy the squirts are with you guys here.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
As long as I keep winnin', you'll do what I want,
right? Guess that means you'll be back next year,
and the year after that, and the year after that...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What're ya talkin' about?! No way am I lettin' ya
beat me again!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Tama, I don't intend to lose either. However...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I don't think any of us mind coming over to play
again! Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And this was how, after beating Oguri Cap, Inari
One, and Super Creek...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tamamo Cross took her Tracen rivals back home
to play with her beloved brother and sister.
